subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath aided to establish proof and demonstration! Thy wondrous letter was noted and thy second brief missive was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ایده الله علی الحجه و البرهان تحریر بدیع ملاحظه گردید و نامه مختصر ثانی مشاهده شد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @review of publications, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
